tasks.label: Deploy HF Space
args: export HF_SPACE_ID="${HF_SPACE_ID:-iHariganesh/f1-race-stratergy}"; if [[ -z "$HF_TOKEN" ]]; then echo HF_TOKEN_MISSING; exit 2; fi; /home/hari/Downloads/opp/.venv/bin/python /home/hari/Downloads/opp/scripts/deploy_to_hf_space.py

tasks.label: Deploy Space Now
args: export HF_SPACE_ID="${HF_SPACE_ID:-iHariganesh/f1-race-stratergy}"; if [[ -z "$HF_TOKEN" ]]; then echo HF_TOKEN_MISSING; exit 2; fi; /home/hari/Downloads/opp/.venv/bin/python /home/hari/Downloads/opp/scripts/deploy_to_hf_space.py; curl -sS -o /tmp/hf_health_latest.json -w '%{http_code}\n' https://ihariganesh-f1-race-stratergy.hf.space/health

tasks.label: Deploy Space Explicit Env
args: export HF_SPACE_ID="${HF_SPACE_ID:-iHariganesh/f1-race-stratergy}"; if [[ -z "$HF_TOKEN" ]]; then echo HF_TOKEN_MISSING; exit 2; fi; /home/hari/Downloads/opp/.venv/bin/python /home/hari/Downloads/opp/scripts/deploy_to_hf_space.py; curl -sS -o /tmp/hf_health_latest.json -w '%{http_code}\n' https://ihariganesh-f1-race-stratergy.hf.space/health
